name: Mikasa Ackerman
name_kanji: ミカサ・アッカーマン
about:
Age: 15, 
Birthdate: February 10
Height: 170 cm (5'7") -> 176 cm (5'9")
Weight: 68 kg (150 lbs) -> 70 kg (154 lbs)
Affiliations: 104th Trainees Squad, Scouting Legion
Graduation rank: 1st

Mikasa is Eren's childhood friend, along with Armin. Mikasa shares an unbreakable bond with Eren following events in their past, and rushes to protect him whenever he is in danger. Mikasa possesses impressive fighting skill and strength even as a child.

As a teen, Mikasa is considered a genius among all the army trainees and is incredibly skilled at combat and agility. She constantly worries for Eren's well-being and lives to protect him.
